title: Computer is invented
subtitle: Invented by Charles Babbage
fact: A computer is a machine that can be programmed to automatically carry out sequences of arithmetic or logical operations (computation).

title: Computer mouse is invented
subtitle: Invented by Douglas Engelbart
fact: A computer mouse is a hand-held pointing device that detects two-dimensional motion relative to a surface.

title: Pascal's calculator is invented
subtitle: Invented by Blaise Pascal
fact: The Pascaline is a mechanical calculator invented by Blaise Pascal in 1642.

title: Mechanical computer is invented
subtitle: Invented by Charles Babbage
fact: A mechanical computer is a computer built from mechanical components such as levers and gears rather than electronic components.

title: Atanasoff–Berry Computer is invented
subtitle: Invented by Clifford Berry
fact: The Atanasoff–Berry computer (ABC) was the first automatic electronic digital computer.

title: Electronic Delay Storage Automatic Calculator is invented
subtitle: Invented by Maurice Wilkes
fact: The Electronic Delay Storage Automatic Calculator (EDSAC) was an early British computer.
